description: Perform a spatial cluster analysis on world cities using the DBSCAN algorithm. Using the vector layer at /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_populated_places.shp, run the DBSCAN clustering algorithm with a minimum cluster size of 3 and a maximum distance of 5 degrees. Export the resulting layer, ensuring the cluster ID field is included, as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/clustered_cities.geojson.
